zh.lifeSummary: 當Adolf II of Holstein Count of Schauenburg and Holstein於1128年出生在德國海因里希_史萊斯維-爾斯坦時，他的父親Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holstein57歲，母親Hildewa Gräfin von Holstein41歲。他於大約1056年與Mrs. Adelheid Bertha von Schauenburg born von Santersleben結婚。他去世於1164年7月6日在德國福萊斯塔阿特 海因里希_包莫德米享年36歲，埋葬在德國福萊斯塔阿特 海因里希_普洛文次 維斯特法倫可萊斯 明登。

nameMeanings.name: Holstein
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from the province of Holstein, long disputed between Germany and Denmark. This gets its name from holsten, the dative plural, originally used after a preposition, of holst, from Middle Low German holt-sate ‘dweller in the woods’ (from Middle Low German holt ‘wood’ + sate, sete ‘tenant’). The final syllable has been erroneously altered by analogy with North German Steen ‘stone’, which in South German and standard German has the form Stein.

variants.name: Hulstein
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Dutch Gerrit, Albertus, Kees.
Dutch vowel variant of German   Holstein  .

variants.name: Hollstein
meanings: Mainly Norwegian: from an Old Norse personal name from hallr ‘rock’ + steinn ‘stone’.

variants.name: Holst
meanings: Altered form, first recorded in the 15th century, of the Old Saxon name Horsa ‘horse’.

variants.name: Holsten
meanings: North German: variant of   Holstein   or   Holst  .

en.lifeSummary: When Adolf II of Holstein Count of Schauenburg and Holstein was born in 1128, in Schleswig-Holstein, Prussia, Germany, his father, Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holstein, was 57 and his mother, Hildewa Gräfin von Holstein, was 41. He married Mrs. Adelheid Bertha von Schauenburg born von Santersleben about 1056. He died on 6 July 1164, in Demmin, Pomerania, Prussia, Germany, at the age of 36, and was buried in Kreis Minden, Westphalia, Prussia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adolf II of Holstein Count of Schauenburg and Holstein est né en 1128, à Schleswig-Holstein, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holstein, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Hildewa Gräfin von Holstein, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Adelheid Bertha von Schauenburg born von Santersleben environ 1056. Il est décédé le 6 juillet 1164, à Demmin, Pommern, Prusse, Allemagne, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Prusse, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adolf II of Holstein Count of Schauenburg and Holstein 1128 in Schleswig-Holstein, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holstein 57 und seine Mutter Hildewa Gräfin von Holstein 41. Er hat um 1056 Mrs. Adelheid Bertha von Schauenburg born von Santersleben geheiratet. Er starb am 6. Juli 1164 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Demmin, Pommern, Freistaat Preußen, Deutschland und wurde in Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Freistaat Preußen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adolf II of Holstein Count of Schauenburg and Holstein è nato il nel 1128 nel Schleswig-Holstein, Preußen, Germania, il suo padre, Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holstein, aveva 57 anni e il suo madre, Hildewa Gräfin von Holstein, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Adelheid Bertha von Schauenburg born von Santersleben circa 1056. Morì il 6 luglio 1164, nel Demmin, Pommern, Freistaat Preußen, Germania, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolto a Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Freistaat Preußen, Germania.

ko.lifeSummary: Adolf II of Holstein Count of Schauenburg and Holstein(이)가 1128년 독일 프레우ss 슐레스위그-홀스타인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holstein(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Hildewa Gräfin von Holstein(은)는 41세였다. 그는 대략 1056년 Mrs. Adelheid Bertha von Schauenburg born von Santersleben(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1164년 7월 6일 독일 프레이스타앳 프레우ss 폼머 데민에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 프레이스타앳 프레우ss 프로빈츠 웨스트파렌 크레이스 민든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adolf II of Holstein Count of Schauenburg and Holstein nasceu em 1128, em Schleswig-Holstein, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holstein, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Hildewa Gräfin von Holstein, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Adelheid Bertha von Schauenburg born von Santersleben aproximadamente 1056. Ele faleceu em 6 de julho de 1164, em Demmin, Pommern, Freistaat Preußen, Alemanha, com 36 anos, e foi sepultado em Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Freistaat Preußen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adolf II of Holstein Count of Schauenburg and Holstein родился в 1128 г. в местности щлесвиг-холстин, Пруссия, Германия, его отцу по имени Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holstein было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Hildewa Gräfin von Holstein, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Adelheid Bertha von Schauenburg born von Santersleben около 1056 г. Он умер 6 июля 1164 г. в местности демминь, поммирн, Пруссия, Германия в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности крис минден, провинз вестфеилен, Пруссия, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adolf II of Holstein Count of Schauenburg and Holstein nació en 1128, en Schleswig-Holstein, Preußen, Alemania, su papá, Count Adolf I of Schauenburg and Holstein, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Hildewa Gräfin von Holstein, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Mrs. Adelheid Bertha von Schauenburg born von Santersleben aproximadamente 1056. Murió el 6 de julio de 1164, en Demmin, Pommern, Freistaat Preußen, Alemania, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultado en Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Freistaat Preußen, Alemania.
